calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-14-2006 Off Calendar

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Continued To Mar-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Linda Ross Myers appearing with and for petitioner. Counsel informed the court that Mr. Roberts is not consenting to the appointment of the successor trustee and the attorney. She wants the Public Administrator to take over the trust. Court has not received any opposition from Mr. Roberts. Counsel to contact the Public Administrator to see if they will take the case. Matter is continued to 3/14. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
